mapper.select: SELECT n.NOTI_NO AS notiNo, n.USER_NO AS userNo, n.NOTI_TYPE AS notiType, n.TITLE AS title, n.MESSAGE AS message, TO_CHAR(n.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS regDate, n.READ_STATUS AS readStatus FROM WEB_NOTIFICATION n JOIN MEMBER m ON n.USER_NO = m.USER_NO WHERE m.EMAIL = #{email} ORDER BY n.REG_DATE DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WEB_NOTIFICATION n JOIN MEMBER m ON n.USER_NO = m.USER_NO WHERE m.EMAIL = #{email} AND n.READ_STATUS = 0

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT n.NOTI_NO AS notiNo, n.USER_NO AS userNo, n.NOTI_TYPE AS notiType, n.TITLE AS title, n.MESSAGE AS message, TO_CHAR(n.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS regDate, n.READ_STATUS AS readStatus FROM WEB_NOTIFICATION n JOIN MEMBER m ON n.USER_NO = m.USER_NO WHERE m.EMAIL = #{email} AND n.READ_STATUS = 0 ORDER BY n.REG_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3
